Main Page

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia.

Welcome to Wikipedia, a collaborative project to produce a free and complete encyclopedia in every language. We started in January 2001 and are already working on over 88,000 articles in the English version, with more being added and improved all the time. Anyone can edit any article right now, without even having to log in. You can copyedit, expand an article, write a little or write a lot. See the Wikipedia FAQ for more background information about the project, and the help page for information on how to use and contribute to Wikipedia.

The content of Wikipedia is covered by the GNU Free Documentation License, which means that it is free and will remain so forever. See wikipedia:Copyrights for the details and open content and free content for background.

Background on current events

This day in history: October 30 - Ongoing events: Israeli-Palestinian conflict - War on Terrorism - terrorist incidents - In the news: World events - Technology - Science discoveries - Sports - Recent deaths: Notable persons - Historical figures

Philosophy, Mathematics, and Natural Science
Astronomy and astrophysics - Biology - Chemistry - Earth science - Mathematics - Philosophy - Physics - Statistics

Social Sciences
Anthropology - Archaeology - Economics - Geography - History - History of science and technology - Language - Linguistics - Political science - Psychology - Sociology

Applied Arts and Sciences
Agriculture - Architecture - Business and industry - Communication - Computer science - Education - Engineering - Health science - Law - Library and information science - Technology - Transport

Culture
Classics - Cooking - Dance - Entertainment - Film - Games - Handicraft - Hobbies - Literature - Music - Opera - Painting - Recreation - Religion - Sculpture - Sports - Theater - Tourism - Visual arts and design

Other Category Schemes
About Wikipedia category schemes - Library of Congress catalog scheme - Dewey Decimal System - Wikipedia arranged by topic - Various Lists - Historical timeline - Historical anniversaries - Biographies - Current events

About the project:
Announcements - FAQ - Policy - Bug reports and feature requests - Wikipedia and Nupedia - Wikipedians - Wikipedia Commentary - Mailing lists - Wikipedia Chat - New topics - Brilliant prose - Requested articles - Help desk - Wikipedia utilities - Wikipedia database download - Public domain resources - Sandbox - Friends of Wikipedia

Press coverage:
News Article (2002) - The New York Times (2001) - MIT's Technology Review (2001)

Wikipedias in other languages
About the non-English Wikipedias - Afrikaans - Arabic (Araby) - Basque (Euskara) - Catalan (Català) - Chinese (Hanyu) - Danish (Dansk) - Dutch (Nederlands) - Esperanto - Estonian (Eesti) - French (Français) - Frisian (Frysk) - German (Deutsch) - Italian (Italiano) - Japanese (Nihongo) - Latin (Latina) - Norwegian (Norsk) - Polish (Polska) - Portuguese (Português) - Russian (Russkiy) - Serbocroatian (Srpskohrvatska) - Slovene (Slovensko) - Spanish (Castellano) - Swedish (Svensk)
